message:
feat(signal,web): add Windows signal mapping and Extensions override test

signal/kind.rs: Add a Windows-specific as_raw_value() implementation
mapping Interrupt->SIGINT, Terminate->SIGTERM, and Quit->SIGBREAK via
libc constants. Other signal kinds return None on Windows. This
completes the cross-platform signal support alongside the existing
unix implementation.

web/extract.rs: Add test verifying that Extensions::insert_typed()
correctly replaces values of the same TypeId (last-writer-wins) while
preserving values of different types. This covers a subtle correctness
property that was previously untested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
